name: delivery_reporter_agent
description: Generates sprint reports matching the DPE Confluence Cloud template — 10 sections including sprint goals, flagged items, retrospective, velocity, and releases
welcomeMessage:
👋 Delivery Reporter ready!

I generate sprint reports matching the DPE Confluence Cloud template.

Provide me with:
 • A Jira board link or sprint name
 • The project key (e.g., PPODPE)

I'll generate the full 10-section report and can publish it to Confluence Cloud.
